NASDAQ:AAPL Financials

Explore the NASDAQ:AAPL financials. Find the Apple financial statements for a comprehensive overview of the company’s financial health. This summary highlights critical numbers from key financial reports, including the Apple annual report, the income statement, balance sheet, and cash flow statement. Gain deeper insights with financial ratios that assess the company's performance and stability. Users can customize their view by selecting data from four periods of either annual or quarterly information, making it easy to track the financial performance of Apple over time.

FAQ

What were Apple's earnings for the latest quarter?

The Apple EPS (TTM) is 8.25. Apple reported sales of The Apple EPS (TTM) is 8.25. Apple reported sales of 111,184.00, net income of 29,578.00, and EPS of 2.01 for the latest quarter., net income of 29,578.00, and EPS of 2.01 for the latest quarter.

What was Apple's net income for the latest quarter?

Apple's net income for the latest quarter was 29,578.00.

How did Apple's performance compare year-over-year in the latest quarter?

The company's revenue moved from 143,756.00 million USD in the previous quarter to 111,184.00 million USD in the latest quarter, and net income moved from 42,097.00 million USD to 29,578.00 million USD compared to the previous quarter.

What is Apple's net profit margin on a TTM basis?

Apple's trailing twelve months (TTM) net profit margin is 27.15%.

How does Apple's debt to equity ratio compare to industry standards?

Apple's total debt-to-equity ratio is 79.55%.

What is Apple's return on investment on a TTM basis?

Apple's trailing twelve months (TTM) return on investment (ROI) is 141.47%.

How has Apple's total revenue grown this year?

Apple's total revenue was 143,756.00 million USD in the previous quarter and 111,184.00 million USD in the latest quarter.

What is Apple's gross margin on a TTM basis?

Apple's trailing twelve months (TTM) gross margin is 47.86%%.

What was Apple's revenue per share for the latest quarter?

Apple's revenue per share for the latest quarter was 122.83.
